name: treemap
description: Squarified treemap of hierarchical data, colored from the brand palette.

meta.props: { data?: TreemapNode; width?: number; height?: number }
meta.dataShape: { name: string; value?: number; children?: TreemapNode[] }  // leaves carry value
meta.example: <TreemapChart data={{ name: 'Spend', children: [{ name: 'GPU', value: 320 }, { name: 'Storage', value: 210 }] }} />
